title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities Digital Technologies in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities Digital Technologies:
HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies!
